zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich “der Schwarze” von Schwerin I於大約1155年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福斯塔特 阿姆 盧本爾斯塔特 阿姆 盧本爾哈根時，他的父親Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I27歲，母親Oda von Lüchow26歲。他於大約1200年與Audacia vel Eudoxia von Pommern von Schlawe結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1228年2月17日在海因里希_普洛文次 薩辛藍德可萊斯 維騰格享年74歲，埋葬在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫史維林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich “der Schwarze” von Schwerin I于大约1155年出生在德国海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福斯塔特 阿姆 盧本爾斯塔特 阿姆 盧本爾哈根时，他的父亲Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I27岁，母亲Oda von Lüchow26岁。他于大约1200年与Audacia vel Eudoxia von Pommern von Schlawe结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1228年2月17日在海因里希_普洛文次 薩辛藍德可萊斯 維騰格享年74岁，埋葬在德国梅可倫波-沃爾包莫史維林。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Schwerin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of the places called Schwerin, in Mecklenburg, Brandenburg, and Pomerania.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: “der
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from an ancient Germanic personal name Adheri, composed of the elements adal ‘clan, nobility’ + heri ‘army’.
German: from Middle High German ader ‘vein’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a barber-surgeon, one of whose functions was to let blood.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from German Ader ‘vein’, probably a name randomly assigned by non-Jewish officials in 18th- and 19th-century German-speaking lands.

variants.name: Aderman
meanings: Americanized form of German Adermann: from a variant of the personal name Ader 1.

nameMeanings.name: Schwarze”
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dieter, Angelika, Bernd, Fritz, Hedwig, Helmut, Horst, Joerg, Kurt, Otto.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname from an inflected form of Middle High German swarz, German schwarz, meaning ‘the black one or the dark one’.
German: habitational name for someone from any of the places called Schwarz.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich “der Schwarze” von Schwerin I was born about 1155, in Hagen, Neustadt am Rübenberge, Neustadt am Rübenberge, Hanover, Prussia, Germany, his father, Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I, was 27 and his mother, Oda von Lüchow, was 26. He married Audacia vel Eudoxia von Pommern von Schlawe about 1200. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 17 February 1228, in Wittenberg, Province of Saxony, Prussia, at the age of 74, and was buried in Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich “der Schwarze” von Schwerin I est né environ 1155, à Hagen, Neustadt am Rübenberge, Neustadt am Rübenberge, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Oda von Lüchow, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Audacia vel Eudoxia von Pommern von Schlawe environ 1200. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 17 février 1228, à Landkreis Wittenberg, Provinz Sachsen, Prusse, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne.

de.Hagen Neustadt Ruebenberg,Hannover,Germa: Hagen, Neustadt am Rübenberge, Neustadt am Rübenberge, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich “der Schwarze” von Schwerin I um 1155 in Hagen, Neustadt am Rübenberge, Neustadt am Rübenberge, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I 27 und seine Mutter Oda von Lüchow 26. Er hat um 1200 Audacia vel Eudoxia von Pommern von Schlawe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Februar 1228 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Landkreis Wittenberg, Provinz Sachsen, Preußen und wurde in Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich “der Schwarze” von Schwerin I è nato il circa 1155 nel Hagen, Neustadt am Rübenberge, Neustadt am Rübenberge, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Germania, il suo padre, Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Oda von Lüchow, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Audacia vel Eudoxia von Pommern von Schlawe circa 1200. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 febbraio 1228, nel Landkreis Wittenberg, Provinz Sachsen, Preußen, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania.

ko.Hagen Neustadt Ruebenberg,Hannover,Germa: 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 니우스타드트 아 u벤버즈 니우스타드트 아 u벤버즈 하겐
ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich “der Schwarze” von Schwerin I(이)가 대략 1155년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 니우스타드트 아 u벤버즈 니우스타드트 아 u벤버즈 하겐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Oda von Lüchow(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1200년 Audacia vel Eudoxia von Pommern von Schlawe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1228년 2월 17일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 작센 랜드크레이스 윗텐버그에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 슈워인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich “der Schwarze” von Schwerin I nasceu aproximadamente 1155, em Hagen, Neustadt am Rübenberge, Neustadt am Rübenberge, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Oda von Lüchow, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Audacia vel Eudoxia von Pommern von Schlawe aproximadamente 1200. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1228, em Landkreis Wittenberg, Provinz Sachsen, Preußen, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha.

ru.Hagen Neustadt Ruebenberg,Hannover,Germa: хаджен, неустадт ам рuбенбирж, неустадт ам рuбенбирж, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich “der Schwarze” von Schwerin I родился около 1155 г. в местности хаджен, неустадт ам рuбенбирж, неустадт ам рuбенбирж, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Fürst Gunzelin Hagen von Schwerin I было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Oda von Lüchow, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Audacia vel Eudoxia von Pommern von Schlawe около 1200 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 17 февраля 1228 г. в местности ландкрис виттенбирг, провинз сачсен, Пруссия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности щвирин, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия.

Se casó con Audacia vel Eudoxia von Pommern von Schlawe aproximadamente 1200. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 17 de febrero de 1228, en Landkreis Wittenberg, Provinz Sachsen, Preußen, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Schwerin, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania.
